impact: fitting_tool.html builds many rows via innerHTML string-concat with inline onclick/onerror/onmouseover/onmouseout attrs embedded in the string (lines 627, 653, 720, 990, 1295, 1297, 1397, 1405, 1444, 1446 ŌĆö 36 inline handlers total). These were excluded from T-031 round 3 because the migration script can't safely regex into JS string literals. Right approach: refactor the relevant renderers to use document.createElement + addEventListener, OR templatize via a hidden <template> element. Until done, this file remains the single largest blocker for T-033's unsafe-inline drop.
resolution:
Refactored fitting_tool.html innerHTML-built rows via Pattern D ŌĆö kept the existing `innerHTML +=` string-concat builders, swapped inline event handlers for the data-attribute dispatcher contract established in ISS-021. Bubbling delegation at `document` catches clicks on dynamically-inserted rows automatically, so no per-row event listener attachment was needed.

**Net result:** fitting_tool.html went from 36 inline handler attributes (per ticket count) to **4 remaining** (`oninput` on search boxes ŌĆö out of scope for ISS-020, tracked under ISS-022). Repo-wide inline-handler count dropped from 184 to 147.

**Stage 1 ŌĆö handler dual-mode rewrites (14 functions):** Each handler that's called from inside fitting_tool's innerHTML now detects dispatcher invocation via `this.dataset.<key>` and falls back to the legacy positional-arg signature for any remaining callers. Updated: `removeItem`, `toggleOnline`, `changeDroneQty`, `addImplant`, `removeImplant`, `loadCharFittings`, `charImportLoad`, `charImportSave`, `openChargeSelector`, `selectCharge`, `clearCharge`, `browseIntoGroup`, `browseToPathIndex`, `addModuleFromBrowser`. (`showModuleInfo` was already dual-mode per ISS-021 commit f43f8e1.)

**Stage 2 ŌĆö innerHTML migrations across 9 render sites:** renderItems (module rows), renderDrones, renderImplantSlots, implantSearchResults, renderCharImportFittings + character list, renderChargeSelector header + rows, renderBrowseTree (back button + group rows), renderBrowseItems, updateBreadcrumbsAsync. All inline `onclick`/`onmouseover`/`onmouseout`/`onerror` replaced with `data-click=`/`data-on-error="hide"` and hover utility classes. Removed Jinja-quote-escaped string args (e.g. `c.type_name.replace(/'/g, "\\'")`) in favor of `escapeHtml()` on data-attr values ŌĆö reuses the existing helper at fitting_tool.html:708 rather than introducing a new one.

**Stage 3 ŌĆö modal backdrops:** Two static `onclick="if(event.target===this)hideŌĆ”Modal()"` handlers on the modal backdrops (#info-modal, #charimport-modal) replaced with `data-click="closeModalOnBackdrop" data-modal-closer="hideXModal"`. New `window.closeModalOnBackdrop` helper added to `static/js/actions.js` ŌĆö reads the closer fn name from `data-modal-closer` and only fires when `e.target === this` (so clicks inside the modal content don't dismiss it).

**Stage 4 ŌĆö page-style additions:**
- `app/templates/base.html`: added `.b-hover-bg:hover { background: var(--bg); }` for the implant search dropdown (only site that hovers to var(--bg) rather than var(--surface) or the gold accent).
- `app/templates/fitting_tool.html` page `<style>` block: added `.charge-selected { background: rgba(200,169,81,0.1); }` for the charge selector's selected-row tint. Crucially, the inline `background:rgba(...)` substring was DROPPED from the row's `style="..."` concat ŌĆö otherwise inline specificity would defeat the `.b-hover-accent:hover` overlay.

**Handler-dual-mode pattern:** ` if (this && this.dataset && this.dataset.<key> !== undefined) { <arg> = parse(this.dataset.<key>); }` prepended to each function. The `!== undefined` form (not truthy check) handles `data-delta="-1"` and `data-item-idx="0"` correctly.

**Verification:**
- `grep -E 'on(click|change|input|submit|error|mouseover|mouseout|mouseenter|mouseleave|focus|blur|keydown|keyup|keypress|mousedown)=' app/templates/fitting_tool.html` returns 4 lines ŌĆö all `oninput` (out of scope, ISS-022).
- Jinja parse check on both modified templates: clean.
- Manual smoke test scope: load ship ŌåÆ add module ŌåÆ add charge (modal flow) ŌåÆ toggle online ŌåÆ drone qty change ŌåÆ implant search + add + remove ŌåÆ char fitting import (Load + Import) ŌåÆ browse tree (drill + breadcrumbs back) ŌåÆ backdrop click closes modals.

Commits: pending deploy.
title: CSP T-031 follow-up: fitting_tool.html innerHTML refactor
